title: lotus broussonetii
intro: Lotus broussonetii, also known as the Loquat tree or Japanese plum, is a deciduous evergreen tree native to East Asia, characterized by its showy white flowers and edible yellow fruits. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lotus broussonetii include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Lotus broussonetii include tea, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
